recommendations.title: My Big Fat Greek Wedding 2
recommendations.overview: The continuing adventures of the Portokalos family. A follow-up to the 2002 comedy, "My Big Fat Greek Wedding."

recommendations.title: Waking Ned
recommendations.overview: When a lottery winner dies of shock, his fellow townsfolk attempt to claim the money.

recommendations.title: Everybody's Fine

recommendations.title: Nanny McPhee
recommendations.overview: Widower Cedric Brown hires Nanny McPhee to care for his seven rambunctious children, who have chased away all previous nannies. Taunted by Simon and his siblings, Nanny McPhee uses mystical powers to instill discipline. And when the children's great-

recommendations.title: What to Expect When You're Expecting
recommendations.overview: Challenges of impending parenthood turn the lives of five couples upside down. Two celebrities are unprepared for the surprise demands of pregnancy; hormones wreak havoc on a baby-crazy author, while her husband tries not to be outdone by his father,

recommendations.title: The Boy Who Harnessed the Wind
recommendations.overview: Against all the odds, a thirteen year old boy in Malawi invents an unconventional way to save his family and village from famine.

recommendations.title: Dallas Buyers Club
recommendations.overview: Loosely based on the true-life tale of Ron Woodroof, a drug-taking, women-loving, homophobic man who in 1986 was diagnosed with HIV/AIDS and given thirty days to live.

recommendations.title: Argentina 1985
recommendations.overview: In the 1980s, a team of lawyers takes on the heads of Argentina's bloody military dictatorship in a battle against odds and a race against time.

recommendations.title: The Worst Person in the World
recommendations.overview: The chronicles of four years in the life of Julie, a young woman who navigates the troubled waters of her love life and struggles to find her career path, leading her to take a realistic look at who she really is.

recommendations.title: Thirteen Lives
